What We Offer
Complete Dental Care
Under One Roof

From routine check-ups to full smile makeovers — Dr. Apoorwa Moghe and team provide comprehensive, painless dental care for the whole family.

🦷
Root Canal Treatment
Painless RCT with modern rotary endo. Save your natural tooth with advanced techniques.
Speciality
✨
Teeth Whitening
Professional bleaching for visibly whiter teeth. Safe, effective and long-lasting results.
Popular
💎
Tooth Jewellery
Single sitting, painless, completely removable fashion statement for your smile.
Unique
😬
Braces & Aligners
Metal, ceramic and clear aligners to straighten and perfect your smile.
Orthodontics
🔩
Dental Implants
Permanent tooth replacement. Natural feel, natural look. Lifetime solution.
Advanced
👑
Crowns & Bridges
Zirconia and ceramic crowns & bridges for damaged or missing teeth.
Restorative
🍼
Paediatric Dentistry
Kid-friendly treatment room. Gentle care for children's milk and permanent teeth.
Kids
🪥
Scaling & Polishing
Deep professional cleaning to remove plaque, tartar and brighten your smile.
Preventive
Meet Your Dentist
Dr. Apoorwa Moghe
MDS · NBA Certified · Gentle Smile Dentocare

Dr. Apoorwa Moghe is a highly qualified dental specialist known for her gentle approach, thorough explanations, and exceptional clinical skills. Patients consistently praise her for making dental visits calm, informative and completely pain-free.

Her nature-inspired clinic design reflects her philosophy — a healing, relaxing environment is as important as the treatment itself.

Tooth Jewellery —
The Innovative Fashion Statement

Make your smile truly unique with our tooth jewellery service. A sparkling crystal placed on your tooth — painlessly, in a single visit, and completely removable whenever you wish.

✓

✓
At affordable prices

✓

Real Results
See the Difference
Gentle Care Makes

Our patients see visible transformation after just one visit. Professional scaling and teeth cleaning removes years of staining, revealing your naturally white, healthy smile.
